reviews.comment:
Lugar muy lindo y cómodo, pero no podes pagar con App (varias veces me paso), te indican que no tienen ticket y lo peor, es el tiempo que demoran en atender.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice and comfortable place, but you can't pay with an app (it happened to me several times), they tell you they don't have a receipt and the worst part is the time it takes to be served.
